name: Project List UI
summary: Frontend UI for displaying the project list with cards, rows, empty states, and dropdown actions
goals: Render a responsive project list with card and row layout options
Provide empty state guidance when no projects exist
Enable per-project dropdown actions (open, clone, delete)

specDetail.description: Renders the main project listing page. Displays projects as cards or rows depending on user preference. Shows an empty state component when no projects are available. Each project item provides a dropdown menu for quick actions.

parameters.name: viewMode
parameters.description: Toggle between card ('grid') and row ('list') display modes

parameters.name: searchQuery
parameters.description: Filter projects by name using a search input

parameters.name: projects
parameters.description: Array of project objects fetched from the API

parameters.name: isLoading
parameters.description: Loading state while fetching project data

constraints: Must render project list within 500ms of data arrival for up to 100 projects
Empty state must be shown immediately when filtered result set is empty
Dropdown actions must be accessible via keyboard navigation

acceptanceCriteria.given: the user navigates to the project list page
acceptanceCriteria.then: a list of project cards is displayed with name, status, and last modified date

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
